title: static HTML docs build system
description:
## Summary
- Replaced Docsify runtime with a Node.js build script
- Pre-render Mermaid code blocks to inline SVG
- Generate static HTML with sidebars, TOC, and search index

## Test plan
- [x] task docs:build FAST=1
- [x] node --test scripts/build-docs.test.js
- [x] node scripts/build-docs.js

Co-Authored-By: gemini-cli
